items.name_en: Genuine leather, Blush Pink & White in stock!!️
items.name_cn:
Genuine leather, Blush Pink & White in stock!!️
DIOR Lady Sheepskin Bing, dynamic and dazzling, the sci-fi visual impact is stunning 🤤. The entire bag body has a pearlescent laser effect, like a rainbow, very stunning! Paired with silver metal, it has even more tension, so eye-catching 👍. The collision of elegance and cool creates a unique style. You must take it out for walks once you get it 😌. It is truly excessively beautiful!! ✔️
Size: 20×16.5×8cm

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather, comes with picture packaging
【Premium Hardware Genuine Leather】Wander Matelasse Sheepskin Hobo Handbag/Shoulder Bag~20cm Grey-Blue Sheepskin
The Wander handbag has become a classic accessory. This mini bag is crafted from Matalasse sheepskin, featuring exquisite craftsmanship that creates a three-dimensional effect, showcasing refined elegance. Featuring a Hobo silhouette, it blends vintage charm with modern elegance, becoming a new symbol of modern femininity.
~Gold hardware
~Zipper closure
~Front metal engraved logo
~Cotton satin lining
Dimensions: W20×H17×D6cm
Code:_5BC125

items.name_en: Genuine leather, in stock 25A Suede bag|
items.name_cn:
Genuine leather, in stock 25A Suede bag|
New arrival of the 25A series, this suede and leather patch bag is a god-tier design! High-quality suede meets smooth calfskin, texture is maxed out. Quilted pattern + classic double C logo, low-key luxury!!️ Suede × glossy leather, the layering is amazing! Distressed gold chain is adjustable, shoulder/ crossbody/clutch in one bag! Fits phone + lipstick + compact, practical and structured! Versatile and suits everyone! size: 35*24*12cm

specs.rawTitle:
Genuine leather, in stock 25A Suede bag|
New arrival of the 25A series, this suede and leather patch bag is a god-tier design! High-quality suede meets smooth calfskin, texture is maxed out. Quilted pattern + classic double C logo, low-key luxury!!️ Suede × glossy leather, the layering is amazing! Distressed gold chain is adjustable, shoulder/ crossbody/clutch in one bag! Fits phone + lipstick + compact, practical and structured! Versatile and suits everyone! size: 35*24*12cm

items.name_en: Genuine quality
items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
New in stock 🅰️🅰️ TILLY 〰️
CE 2024 Chinese New Year Limited Edition TILLY Handbag.
The latest rounded shoulder bag, continuing the tone of the CE CROQUE handbag. This minimalist style handbag is adorned with TRIOMPHE metal hardware. It can hold a phone, car keys, cosmetics, and other essentials. The capacity is sufficient. The bag shape is structured, with a zipper closure. It has 1 main compartment and 1 interior flat pocket. The shoulder strap is adjustable. Compared to the previous Tilly, this one is more retro and cute 😍!
Model No.: 115702
Color: Denim (with original packaging)
Dimensions: 22x13.5x4

items.name_en: Genuine quality
items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
BVLGARI SERPENTI FOREVER shoulder bag
Model: 289676
Dimensions: 19-13-7cm
The new "Serpenti Forever" series shoulder bag highlights urban style and fashion versatility, adding a unique trendy touch to the Serpenti world. This bag is crafted from peach-colored calfskin with light gold-plated brass accessories. Black and white agate enamel and green malachite sensual eyes add a bewitching charm to the classic snake head clasp. An adjustable serpentine chain and leather shoulder strap easily match stylish daywear.
Small size, two compartments, and a delicate vanity mirror on one side that can be personalized. An unremovable credit card holder, an open pocket, a zip pocket, and two external pockets.

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
❤️【Lady Dior My ABC】'Matte Black Calfskin'
/5-Compartment Calfskin/
This handbag embodies Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty.
Exquisitely crafted from lambskin with a signature herringbone stitching and quilted details, this classic design is timeless.
Adorned with tonal enamel, lined with suede, and equipped with a chain shoulder strap and a zip pocket inside.
Can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
Size: 24 x 20 x 11 cm
